SEARCH
Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user

Class ChatPermissions

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user.ChatPermissions
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ChatPermissions extends Object implements Serializable
Describes actions that a non-administrator user is allowed to take in a chat.
Since:
3 March 2025
Version:
1.3.0
Author:
Natanim
